subcodes.first_line: O friends! The ocean of divine knowledge hath appeared and the sun of insight hath become manifest. Blessed is the soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان دریای دانائی پیدا و آفتاب بینائی هویدا نیکوست حال نفسیکه سراب او را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God
